cards.name: Overripe Goblin Cheese
rules_text: A fist-sized lump of greenish cheese wrapped in greasy cloth. The smell is strong enough to clear a small room.
cards.flavor_text: A delicacy among goblins. A biological weapon to everyone else.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Necklace of Animal Teeth
rules_text: A crude necklace made from various animal teeth tied together with leather cord.
cards.flavor_text: Each tooth marks a victory. Or at least a very determined scavenging session.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Pig Talisman
rules_text: A dried pig testicle tied to a leather string and worn as a supposed charm of luck.
cards.flavor_text: Farmers swear by it. The pigs strongly disagree.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Single Muddy Boot
rules_text: A worn leather boot filled with dried mud.
cards.flavor_text: The other boot is probably living a better life somewhere.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Bent Copper Spoon
rules_text: A badly bent spoon made of cheap copper.
cards.flavor_text: Either cursed or used for extremely enthusiastic soup.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Jar of Suspicious Pickles
rules_text: A small glass jar containing cloudy liquid and several unidentifiable pickled objects.
cards.flavor_text: Nobody remembers putting them in there.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Broken Goblin Arrow
rules_text: Half of a poorly crafted goblin arrow with chipped flint head.
cards.flavor_text: The other half probably hit something important.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Lucky River Stone
rules_text: A smooth grey stone that fits comfortably in the palm.
cards.flavor_text: It has brought its owner tremendous luck. Statistically speaking.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Bottle of Black Sand
rules_text: A small corked bottle filled with fine black sand.
cards.flavor_text: Nobody knows where it came from. Everyone assumes it’s haunted.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Rusty Nail Bundle
rules_text: A handful of old iron nails tied together with twine.
cards.flavor_text: Guaranteed to summon tetanus.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Mysterious Bone Fragment
rules_text: A polished fragment of bone from an unknown creature.
cards.flavor_text: Probably not cursed. Probably.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Tangled Fishing Line
rules_text: A hopeless knot of fishing line wrapped around a wooden hook.
cards.flavor_text: The fish clearly won this round.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Goblin Dice
rules_text: Two uneven bone dice carved by goblins.
cards.flavor_text: They always roll high. For goblins.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Bottle of Questionable Perfume
rules_text: A tiny vial containing strong floral perfume.
cards.flavor_text: One drop smells delightful. Two drops cause headaches.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Bag of Beetle Shells
rules_text: A small pouch filled with shiny beetle carapaces.
cards.flavor_text: Fashionable somewhere, probably.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Half Melted Candle
rules_text: A squat candle stuck to a wooden base.
cards.flavor_text: Burned during a very long and very boring sermon.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Cracked Drinking Horn
rules_text: A drinking horn with a visible crack along the side.
cards.flavor_text: Drinks leak faster than stories.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Bundle of Old Keys
rules_text: Several mismatched iron keys tied to a ring.
cards.flavor_text: None of them open anything you own.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Jar with Two Eyes
rules_text: A sealed jar containing two cloudy eyeballs floating in liquid.
cards.flavor_text: They are definitely not looking at you.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Strange Wooden Idol
rules_text: A rough wooden carving depicting an unknown deity.
cards.flavor_text: The god worshipped here has not returned the call.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Old Map Fragment
rules_text: A torn piece of parchment showing an unrecognizable map.
cards.flavor_text: Treasure may have been here once.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Goblin Cooking Spoon
rules_text: A large wooden spoon stained with questionable ingredients.
cards.flavor_text: Do not ask what was cooked.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Bundle of Feathers
rules_text: Several colorful feathers tied with string.
cards.flavor_text: The bird community is still filing complaints.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Crude Bone Whistle
rules_text: A small whistle carved from bone.
cards.flavor_text: Produces a sound unpleasant to both ears and souls.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Small Sack of Ash
rules_text: A cloth sack containing cold grey ash.
cards.flavor_text: Once something important. Probably.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Bent Tin Mug
rules_text: A dented mug with a loose handle.
cards.flavor_text: Still perfectly capable of holding disappointment.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Cracked Glass Lens
rules_text: A magnifying lens with a large crack across it.
cards.flavor_text: Everything looks suspicious through it.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Threadbare Sock
rules_text: A single wool sock full of holes.
cards.flavor_text: Its partner vanished years ago.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Tiny Bell
rules_text: A small brass bell attached to a leather cord.
cards.flavor_text: Rings loudly at the worst possible time.
cards.author: wschu
